evals.name: stage-with-original
evals.prompt: I virtually staged this empty living room for an MLS listing in California. Here's the staged photo (fixtures/staged.png) and the unaltered original (fixtures/empty.png). Make it compliant to publish.
evals.expected_output: The staged photo re-saved with a conspicuous 'Virtually Staged' caption; a disclosure-assets.md with the ready-to-paste MLS remark + the AB-723 disclosure line (with an original-URL slot); and a side-by-side ORIGINAL+ALTERED pair image.

assertions.text: A stamped output image is produced under a disclosed/ folder
The stamped image carries a legible, conspicuous 'Virtually Staged' caption (vision)
disclosure-assets.md exists and contains a ready-to-paste MLS remark mentioning virtual staging
disclosure-assets.md contains the AB-723 line with an unaltered-original URL/QR slot
A side-by-side pair image (original + altered) is produced

evals.name: twilight-no-original
evals.prompt: Add the required disclosure to this day-to-dusk twilight exterior I edited with AI (fixtures/staged.png). I don't have the original file handy right now.
evals.expected_output: The photo stamped with a 'Digitally Altered' caption, and a disclosure-assets.md that includes an explicit ACTION REQUIRED note that AB-723 still requires hosting the unaltered original at a public, login-free URL/QR.

assertions.text: The stamped image carries a conspicuous 'Digitally Altered' caption (vision)
disclosure-assets.md includes an ACTION REQUIRED note about hosting the unaltered original
No original pair image is fabricated when no original is supplied

evals.name: video-first-frame-card
evals.prompt: This is an AI-generated listing tour video (fixtures/tour.mp4) built from a property's photos. Make the disclosure compliant for posting.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes it is video, provides the first-frame disclosure card text ('Video created from listing photos using AI motion technology'), a ready ffmpeg command to burn it in, and the MLS remark.

assertions.text: Produces the first-frame card text 'Video created from listing photos using AI motion technology'
Provides a runnable ffmpeg drawtext command to burn the card into frame one
disclosure-assets.md includes the MLS remark for the video
